# opnsense_unbound_acl (Data Source)

Look up an existing Unbound ACL on OPNsense by UUID without importing it into Terraform management.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Look up an existing Unbound ACL by UUID
data "opnsense_unbound_acl" "example" {
  id = "12345678-1234-1234-1234-123456789012"
}

output "unbound_acl_id" {
  value = data.opnsense_unbound_acl.example.id
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) UUID to look up.

### Read-Only

- `action` (String) ACL action.
- `description` (String) Description of the ACL.
- `enabled` (Boolean) Whether this ACL is enabled.
- `name` (String) ACL name.
- `networks` (String) Networks covered by this ACL.
